issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for Vite configuration.
The instructions lack concrete code snippets or command examples for implementation.

scenarios.name: Component library build config
scenarios.rationale: Treatment configures `build.lib` with entry and formats (es, cjs, umd), externalizes peer dependencies, and adds vite-plugin-dts for TypeScript declarations; baseline often relies on rollup directly or omits dts generation.

scenarios.name: CRA to Vite migration
scenarios.rationale: Treatment installs @vitejs/plugin-react, removes react-scripts, renames REACT_APP_* env vars to VITE_* (read via import.meta.env), and moves the entry module reference into index.html; baseline keeps process.env usage or skips the index.html change.
